Calendar types.

public enum esriCalendarEnum

Fields

esriCalendarChineseLuniSolar = 15

15: Chinese lunisolar calendar.

esriCalendarGregorian = 1

1: Gregorian (localized) calendar.

esriCalendarGregorianArabic = 10

10: Gregorian Arabic calendar.

esriCalendarGregorianMEFrench = 9

9: Gregorian Middle East French calendar.

esriCalendarGregorianUS = 2

2: Gregorian (U.S.) calendar.

esriCalendarGregorianXLITEnglish = 11

11: Gregorian Transliterated English calendar.

esriCalendarGregorianXLITFrench = 12

12: Gregorian Transliterated French calendar.

esriCalendarHebrew = 8

8: Hebrew calendar.

esriCalendarHijri = 6

6: Hijri (Arabic Lunar) calendar.

esriCalendarJapan = 3

3: Japanese Emperor Era calendar.

esriCalendarJapaneseLuniSolar = 14

14: Japanese lunisolar calendar.

esriCalendarJulian = 13

13: Julian calendar.

esriCalendarKorea = 5

5: Korean Tangun Era calendar.

esriCalendarKoreanLuniSolar = 20

20: Korean lunisolar calendar.

esriCalendarLunarEtoChn = 17

17: Reserved to match Office.

esriCalendarLunarEtoKor = 18

18: Reserved to match Office.

esriCalendarLunarEtoRokuyou = 19

19: Reserved to match Office.

esriCalendarPersian = 22

22: Persian calendar.

esriCalendarSake = 16

16: Reserved to match Office.

esriCalendarTaiwan = 4

4: Taiwan Era calendar.

esriCalendarTaiwanLuniSolar = 21

21: Taiwan lunisolar calendar.

esriCalendarThai = 7

7: Thai calendar.

esriCalendarUmAlQura = 23

23: Umm al-Qura calendar.

esriCalendarUnknown = 0

0: Unknown calendar.
